sourceRootLabel: AgenC WP-03 checklist, daemon AuthBackend contract, and portal JSON-RPC protocol

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The shared portal protocol allowlist includes auth.whoami, auth.login, and auth.logout plus explicit portal auth capability flags.
edgeCases: The portal method guard continues rejecting permission and tool mutation methods outside the WP-03 scope.
The initialize request advertises auth capabilities with the same daemon protocol version as other portal requests.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: Portal auth.login uses the daemon AuthBackend token store and auth.whoami reads the same identity through the established daemon JSON-RPC connection.
edgeCases: The daemon socket identity from initialize is preserved in the AuthBackend whoami params.
auth.logout clears the AuthBackend state and subsequent whoami returns unauthenticated.
whoami responses used by the portal do not expose raw AuthBackend tokens.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The sibling portal renders redacted auth state and invokes auth.login/auth.logout through the initialized daemon WebSocket instead of keeping a separate browser token store.
edgeCases: Login refreshes identity through auth.whoami after the AuthBackend login result is received.
Logout refreshes identity through auth.whoami after AuthBackend state is cleared.
The portal self-test fails if a raw token appears in rendered auth state.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: WP-03 verification runs the targeted runtime portal auth tests and the sibling portal self-test, and reviewer evidence always includes agenc-portal for WP items.
edgeCases: A missing sibling portal auth marker fails verify.mjs before reviewer.
The reviewer prompt includes sibling repo status/log evidence even when a terse WP row does not spell out the repo name.

intentionalReductions: WP-03 does not introduce a hosted portal backend; local and remote portal connections still target daemon JSON-RPC endpoints from WP-02.
The browser portal intentionally does not persist AuthBackend tokens. The daemon owns token persistence and the portal renders only redacted whoami identity state.
Session and agent mutation workflows remain owned by WP-04 and WP-05.

mergeResolutions.context: main integrated MM-01 while WP-03 was in progress and introduced a type-only execa import that is not exported by the installed execa version.
mergeResolutions.resolution: Kept the merged Windows secure-storage DPAPI behavior and replaced the invalid external type import with the local result shape this file actually reads.
